pi_items.source: Code analysis of setup_task.sh amenities data. Counted distinct amenities across all hotels: WiFi, Bar, Restaurant, Gym, Spa, Concierge, Valet, Pool.

Code analysis of setup_task.sh amenities data. Summed amenity count per hotel: Hotel Artemide (3) + Hotel Adlon Kempinski (4) + Hotel de Crillon (4) + The Savoy (3) + The Plaza Hotel (4) + Park Hyatt Tokyo (4) + Copacabana Palace (2) = 24 total HasAmenity edges.
Confirmed in setup_task.sh line 55 and seed_demodb.py line 231. The Plaza Hotel is a real hotel in New York with proper data.
Code analysis of setup_task.sh line 55 which defines: ("The Plaza Hotel", ["WiFi", "Gym", "Spa", "Concierge"])

privileged_info_summary: The task uses synthetic data generated by setup_task.sh that injects amenities into 7 hotels in the demodb database. The actual data contains 8 distinct amenities (WiFi, Bar, Restaurant, Gym, Spa, Concierge, Valet, Pool). The Plaza Hotel is the target hotel with amenities [WiFi, Gym, Spa, Concierge]. However, the expected_edge_count in metadata is incorrect: it claims 19 edges but the injected data will create 24 HasAmenity edges total (sum of amenities per hotel across all 7 hotels).
